name: startup-ideation-skills
description: Evidence-first startup ideation skills for problem inventory, problem discovery, assumption grilling, validation tests, interview synthesis, and narrow v1 scoping.

interface.shortDescription: Turn startup ideas into evidence, tests, and narrow v1 scopes.
interface.longDescription: A practical, evidence-first skill pack for startup ideation. Use it to inventory problem candidates, log pains, grill assumptions, design validation tests, synthesize interview evidence, and cut ideas down to a small v1 before building too much.
defaultPrompt: Use startup-problem-inventory to generate startup problem candidates from my founder experience.
Use startup-problem-ledger to capture a raw startup pain.
Use startup-problem-grilling to challenge this idea before I build anything.
Use startup-validation-test-designer to create a small validation test.
Use startup-interview-synthesis to synthesize customer interview notes.
Use startup-v1-feasibility to cut this down to a 2-4 week v1.
